/usr/bin/clang++ -g -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/sound_processor.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sound_processor.dir/src/application.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sound_processor.dir/src/args_parser.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sound_processor.dir/src/converter.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sound_processor.dir/src/pipeline.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sound_processor.dir/src/waveform.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sound_processor.dir/src/wav_io.cpp.o -o sound_processor
